# CredentialSessionWindowSceneEvent.presentation

**Case**

User has perform gesture on device to request for app presentation

## Declaration

```swift
case presentation
```

## Events

- **CredentialSessionWindowSceneEvent.readerDetected**: External NFC reader is detected, i.e. presence of a NFC field
